$comment_plan: Snowflake customer demo rates: CD-DEMO Base + Tier rate cards, RateCardEntry rows, RateAdjustmentByTier on Tier card only. RABT inserts while parent RCE is Draft (same pass). ProductSellingModel matches Standard PBE (Term Monthly/TermDefined for SF-USG-*). Load after rating, then activate_rates. See docs/references/customer-template-rate-card-entry.md and docs/references/customer-template-tier-rate-card-lessons-learned.md.
$comment_composite_keys: RateCardEntry uses Insert without deleteOldData to avoid wiping org-wide entries; run delete_customer_demo_rates_data before each load. PriceBookRateCard is Upsert-only (no deleteOldData).

objects.query: SELECT Name, ProductCode, StockKeepingUnit, UsageModelType FROM Product2 ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC
SELECT Description, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, Name, Type FROM RateCard ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT PriceBookId, PriceBook.Name, RateCardId, RateCard.Name, RateCard.Type, RateCardType FROM PriceBookRateCard ORDER BY PriceBook.Name ASC, RateCard.Name ASC, RateCardType ASC

objects.$comment: Insert without deleteOldData — scoped Apex delete runs first (delete_customer_demo_rates_data).
objects.query: SELECT DefaultUnitOfMeasureClassId, DefaultUnitOfMeasureClass.Name, DefaultUnitOfMeasureId, DefaultUnitOfMeasure.Name, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, ProductId, Product.StockKeepingUnit, ProductSellingModelId, ProductSellingModel.Name, ProductSellingModel.SellingModelType, Rate, RateCardId, RateCard.Name, RateCard.Type, RateNegotiation, RateUnitOfMeasureClassId, RateUnitOfMeasureClass.Name, RateUnitOfMeasureId, RateUnitOfMeasure.UnitCode, RateUnitOfMeasure.Name, Status, UsageResourceId, UsageResource.Code, UsageResource.Name FROM RateCardEntry ORDER BY Product.StockKeepingUnit ASC, RateCard.Name ASC, UsageResource.Code ASC

objects.$comment: Parent RateCardEntry must remain Draft during this insert; activation runs via activate_rates after load. externalId uses relationship paths — Insert skips v5 Upsert TARGET SELECT bug.
objects.query: SELECT AdjustmentType, AdjustmentValue, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, LowerBound, ProductId, Product.StockKeepingUnit, ProductSellingModelId, RateCardEntryId, RateCardEntry.RateCard.Name, RateCardEntryStatus, RateUnitOfMeasureName, RateUnitOfMeasureId, RateUnitOfMeasure.UnitCode, UpperBound, UsageResourceId, UsageResource.Code FROM RateAdjustmentByTier ORDER BY Product.StockKeepingUnit ASC, RateCardEntry.Name ASC, UsageResource.Code ASC, RateUnitOfMeasure.UnitCode ASC
